item.description:
## What's Changed * fix(release): drop blank gap before direct-push commits by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/23 * docs(readme): add config backup and tiny download features by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/24 * feat(api): add lockime:// URL scheme automation by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/25 * feat(rules): add URL match types and drag-to-reorder priority by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/26 * docs(readme): refresh settings screenshots for current UI ([`f050428`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/f0504280adb8344dc2b81cb41eb85fb3a68bcc84))
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.3.0...v1.4.0

item.title: 1.3.0-beta.3
item.description:
## What's Changed * feat(rules): add URL match types and drag-to-reorder priority by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/26
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.3.0-beta.2...v1.3.0-beta.3

## What's Changed * feat(update): disable real updates in make run dev builds by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/12 * feat(log): differentiate activation reasons and add row context by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/13 * feat(url): support Firefox-based browsers in per-URL rules by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/14 * feat(build): separate dev app identity from releases by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/15 * fix(update): derive stop identity from lab run copy by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/16 * feat(backup): add config export/import via .lockime files by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/18 * build(dmg): shrink download by trimming icon slot and using ULFO by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/19 * refactor(update): render release notes natively, dropping MarkdownUI by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/21 * feat(rules): add one-shot switch action for app/URL rules by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/22
* docs(test): note the expected CoreData stderr in the fallback test ([`e9834e8`](https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/commit/e9834e874fd3adb9f480c95080033d202ba88c58))
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.2.2...v1.3.0

## What's Changed * test: add CI-safe unit coverage across LockIMEKit by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/10 * feat(lock): detect Spotlight and launcher overlays for rules by @BlackHole1 in https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/pull/11
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oomol-lab/LockIME/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2
